Class Human

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.strategy.PlayerBehaviour
com.risk.strategy.Human
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Human extends PlayerBehaviour
Human class contains methods for the Player Behavior Strategies of computer player.

A human player that requires user interaction to make decisions.

Author:
Karandeep Singh, Ruthvik Shandilya

  • Method Details

    • reinforcementPhase

      public void reinforcementPhase(javafx.collections.ObservableList<Country> countryList, Country country, Player currentPlayer)
      Method for Human class for reinforcement phase. Start and end of the reinforcement phase.
      Specified by:
      reinforcementPhase in class PlayerBehaviour
      Parameters:
      countryList - List of countries owned by the player.
      country - Country to which reinforcement armies are to be assigned.
      currentPlayer - Current player.

    • attackPhase

      public void attackPhase(javafx.scene.control.ListView<Country> attackingCountryList, javafx.scene.control.ListView<Country> defendingCountryList, Player currentPlayer)
      Method for Human class for attack phase.
      Specified by:
      attackPhase in class PlayerBehaviour
      Parameters:
      attackingCountryList - List of countries attacking.
      defendingCountryList - List of countries defending.
      currentPlayer - Current player.

    • fortificationPhase

      public boolean fortificationPhase(javafx.scene.control.ListView<Country> selectedCountryList, javafx.scene.control.ListView<Country> adjCountryList, Player playerPlaying)
      Method for Human class for fortification phase. Start and end of the fortification phase.
      Specified by:
      fortificationPhase in class PlayerBehaviour
      Parameters:
      selectedCountryList - List of countries selected by the player.
      adjCountryList - List of adjacent countries.
      playerPlaying - Current player.
      Returns:
      true If the fortification successful; other wise false.

    • isAttackMoveValid

      public boolean isAttackMoveValid(Country attacking, Country defending)
      Method to check if the attack move is valid or not.
      Parameters:
      attacking - Country attacking.
      defending - Country under attack.
      Returns:
      true If the attack move is valid; other wise false.

    • playerCanAttack

      public boolean playerCanAttack(javafx.scene.control.ListView<Country> countries)
      Method to check if the player can attack or not.
      Specified by:
      playerCanAttack in class PlayerBehaviour
      Parameters:
      countries - List view of all the countries of the player.
      Returns:
      true If the player can attack; other wise false.
